title: Spec: orphan-branch task state (eliminate balls-bookkeeping commits from main)
description: Design spec for moving task state to an orphan branch (balls/tasks) with a symlinked worktree, so the main git log contains only feature commits. Covers: topology, text-mergeable schema invariant, delivery-tag ground truth, push ordering, stealth mode carveout, hand-edit workflow. First step in spec -> integ tests -> code cycle. No code changes in this task; produces SPEC.md only.

notes.author: mark
notes.text: Spec for orphan-branch task state. 14 sections covering principles, terminology, topology, schema invariant, delivery tag, sync protocol, stealth carveout, bl init, hand-edit workflow, non-goals, open questions, and 15 conformance tests. No code changes.
